emails.subject: NATURAL GAS NOMINATION FOR 09/00
emails.body: Lee, FYI. Enron Methanol has been taking about 5,000 swing each day for August. So, I added 5,000 for September (#139057 GD) in addition to the 34,000 they nom'd. D Forwarded by Daren J Farmer/HOU/ECT on 08/25/2000 03:02 PM Michael Mitcham@ENRON 08/25/2000 02:39 PM
